proof:
intro x hx
  suffices Real.sqrt 2 ≤ x + 1 / (2 * x) by linarith
  rw [← mul_le_mul_right (a := 2 * x) (by positivity)]
  have : 2 * x ≠ 0 := by positivity
  field_simp
  have : 0 ≤ (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1) ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
  rw [sub_sq, mul_pow, Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num), one_pow] at this
  linarith
